{{Infobox technique
| name = Fox Dream
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Fox]] Dream is a specialized [[Ruler]]-level technique utilized by practitioners on the [[Path of the White Fox]]. It functions by invading and disrupting the [[dream aura]] within a target's mind, often creating distracting illusions that can penetrate an opponent's defenses. Because [[sacred artists]] possess inherent mental resistance tied to the strength of their spirit, mastering this technique is considered difficult. While highly effective for causing confusion or misdirection, the technique has been noted by some to be inefficient in its fundamental execution. It is often used in conjunction with other [[White Fox]] abilities, such as the [[Fox Mirror]] or [[Foxfire]], to overwhelm or deceive enemies.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Rulers]] on the [[Path of the White Fox]] use [[aura]] of light and dreams to trap enemies in a [[Fox Dream]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Fox Dream]] is an illusion technique that settles around a target's head like a cage.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fox Dream]] is a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Fox Dream]] technique is described as flawed.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Fox Dream]] is a technique used by [[Kelsa]] to seize [[dream aura]] and create distracting illusions.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Fox Dream]] is a technique used for mental manipulation via [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fox Dream]] is an illusion technique used by [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
